summary: TWO_COLUMN: physics race between cycloid and straight-chord beads from A=(0,0) to B=(πR,−2R). ValueTracker τ in REAL seconds drives both beads via always_redraw using cycloid pendulum identity θ=√(g/R)·τ for one and constant-acceleration kinematics on the slope for the other. Right column shows live τ, the two arrival times t_c=π√(R/g) and t_l, and a status caption that flips to 'cycloid wins!' the moment the yellow bead arrives.
